title: Reborn Adventures
description: A vanilla+ RPG style modpack with level progression for Fabric 1.20.1
body:
Dive into a Vanilla+ RPG modpack focused on leveling up and exploring. Packed with 100+ high-quality mods, this experience will take your gameplay to new heights.

**Features**
- 🌎 Seasons: Experience dynamic changes as biome temperatures and weather shift with the passing seasons.
- 🌡️ Temperature: Brave the elements as you navigate through cold biomes and harsh winters, requiring you to stay warm to survive.
- 🎯 Skills: Progress through the game by earning Level XP and mastering new abilities.
- 💪 Stronger Mobs: Encounter fiercer challenges as mobs gain increased movement speed and deadly new abilities.
- ⚔️ Combat: Engage in thrilling battles with reworked weapons featuring diverse animations and attack styles, including the option for dual wielding.

Some mods in this pack require I link back to them, so please go support the developers of them as well:
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise)
- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-enchantments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-enchantments)
